caption: Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart are seated side-by-side in front of a lush, jungle-themed backdrop featuring the "JUMANJI WELCOME TO THE JUNGLE" logo. Both men wear dark, long-sleeved shirts; Johnson wears a simple gold chain, and Hart wears eyeglasses and a bracelet. In the initial scene, blue and green text overlays identify them as "DWAYNE JOHNSON" and "KEVIN HART." As the sequence progresses, the text overlays disappear. Johnson transitions from a neutral expression to a broad smile, looking toward Hart. Hart remains relatively still, though he briefly clasps and unclasp his hands and brings them together in a clapping motion. The two maintain a friendly demeanor throughout the clip, with Johnson's gaze and smile shifting slightly as the shot continues against the static tropical forest background.
